method: voxel contains (pitch 0.35) per grid cell vs reference cell tessellation
architecture: shared measured-outline loft (outline.scad, 50 X-Z convex section stations) + per-part measured interior voids (voids.scad)
caveat: contains() reports phantom FN on non-watertight part meshes (coincident CSG faces); per-part figures are lower bounds — verified by offset re-probe + ghost overlays
